subcodes.first_line: O ye two sincere servants of the True One! That which ye had written to his honour the Siyyid hath been perused. These afflictions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق حق آنچه بجناب سید مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید این صدمات در
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @petitions to authorities, @love of God, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
